headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Invesco (IVZ) After Its 99% One Year Surge?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Invesco’s recent run means the stock still offers value, or if most of the easy upside is already reflected in the price. The stock last closed at US$27.35, with returns of 6.7% over 7 days, 19.5% over 30 days, 1.5% year to date, 98.7% over 1 year and 95.3% over 3 years, compared with 27.1% over 5 years. Recent news coverage has focused on Invesco’s position in the asset management industry and how investors are reacting to shifting expectations for fund...
